response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack web developer with strong software craftsmanship, but the role requires deep hardware expertise — SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appears in the resume. His low-latency DLang systems work and brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments are the closest touchpoints, but they fall far short of principal-level computer architecture experience with GPUs, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, fibers) handling millions of requests per second
Broad, adaptable engineering background spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, open-source contributions, teaching and workshops
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance-analysis experience
No deep neural network training or inference optimization background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not principal-level hardware architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DL workload experience
